cv_resume: Fullstack developer with experience in Web and Mobile applications using the ReactJS ecosystem, building APIs with NodeJS frameworks such as ExpressJS and NestJS, and using cloud services like AWS Lambda, S3, SES, SQS, and DynamoDB, among others. Also able to assist in maintaining systems built in Java, C#, or Clojure. I enjoy being creative and building my own solutions to problems, while continuously learning new technologies and ways to improve productivity and code quality.
